response.overview: A Mvskoke person seeks revenge on male abusers who prey on Indigenous community members and until now, have never been held accountable. After each escalation of revenge and violence, they are left to reckon with the spiritual responsibility of their actions. Indigenous people experience abuse from strangers, partners, community members, the government and more. Holding abusers accountable is controversial, and in the film I will trouble the narrative with experimental storytelling techniques, including movement.
response.title: RID
